[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101101 5
1 1100000 2
2 0110110 4
3 0000110 2
4 1000100 2
5 1011101 5
6 1101101 5
7 1110010 4

34 43 1011101 5 match 5

56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1111010 5
70 07 1011010 4

24 42 1011111 6
